choices: Rare pedestrian-in-rain scenes missing from fleet logs
items.explain: Example 10.15 describes synthetic pedestrian-in-rain-at-night clips rarely present in logged fleet data.

items.prompt: Synthetic data can augment computer-vision training with backgrounds and lighting not seen in real photos.
items.explain: Sections 10.6.5 and Example 10.16 describe rendered product photos under varied lighting and clutter.

choices: Simulate ransomware encryption patterns for detection drills
Generate synthetic patient cohorts for GDPR sharing
items.explain: Example 10.17 replays synthetic ransomware patterns to test backup workflow detection latency.

items.prompt: Why are edge-case driving scenarios good candidates for synthetic generation?
items.rubric: Mention rare, dangerous, or costly-to-log conditions and improved robustness before deployment.
items.sample_answer: Edge cases are rare or unsafe to collect at scale in the real world; synthetic clips let stacks train on critical scenarios before deployment.

items.prompt: Cybersecurity synthetic data can combine normal traffic with simulated attacks such as DDoS or phishing.
items.explain: Section 10.6.6 describes augmenting real network data with synthetic anomalies and attack simulations.
